name: GrowthDesk - Talk to Human Routing Workflow

nodes.name: Webhook - Human Request
nodes.notes: Chatbot POSTs here when student clicks Talk to a Human.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'human_request_received', ticket_id: $json.ticket_id, message: 'Your request has been sent to our team. We will respond within 2-3 hours.' }) }}

nodes.name: Prepare Human Request Data
nodes.notes: Detects working hours, priority lead status, and assigns to right agent.

nodes.name: Priority Lead?
nodes.notes: Priority = Lead score >= 80, PCM >= 85%, or High interest. These get immediate senior agent attention.

parameters.subject: =⭐ PRIORITY LEAD wants Human Support | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | {{ $json.student_name }} - {{ $json.city }}
parameters.message:
=

Priority Lead — Human Support Requested

This is a high-potential student (Lead Score: {{ $json.lead_score }}, PCM: {{ $json.pcm_percentage }}%). They want to talk to a human. Converting them could mean ₹40,000–₹80,000 in enrollment. Respond fast.

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Student{{ $json.student_name }}
City{{ $json.city }}
Target Exam{{ $json.target_exam }}
Lead Score{{ $json.lead_score }}/100
PCM %{{ $json.pcm_percentage }}%
Interest Level{{ $json.interest_level }}
Pipeline Stage{{ $json.stage }}
Source{{ $json.source }}
Student Message{{ $json.student_message }}
Raised At{{ $json.raised_at_readable }}
Working Hours?{{ $json.is_working_hours ? 'Yes — respond now' : 'No — respond first thing 9AM' }}
Assigned To{{ $json.assigned_to }}

Recommended Actions:

  • Senior Support: Call or email student within 1 hour (priority)
  • Notify Lead Scoring Team: This lead needs re-scoring after call
  • Notify Outreach Team: Trigger personalised outreach sequence
  • If student enrolls: Notify Commercial Team for commercial workflow

parameters.subject: =💬 Human Support Requested | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | {{ $json.student_name }} - {{ $json.city }}
parameters.message:
=

Student Requested Human Support

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
Student{{ $json.student_name }}
City{{ $json.city }}
Target Exam{{ $json.target_exam }}
Lead Score{{ $json.lead_score }}/100
Student Message{{ $json.student_message }}
Raised At{{ $json.raised_at_readable }}
Expected Wait{{ $json.wait_time }}
Assigned To{{ $json.assigned_to }}

Please respond to this student within 2-3 hours during working hours (9AM-7PM IST).

parameters.subject: =A real human is on the way! | {{ $json.ticket_id }} | GrowthDesk
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.student_name }}, our team is on it! 👋

You've requested to speak with a human agent. Our support team has been notified and will reach out to you shortly.

Ticket ID{{ $json.ticket_id }}
StatusAssigned to Support Team
Expected Response{{ $json.wait_time }}
Working HoursMonday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST

While you wait, here's a quick tip for your {{ $json.target_exam }} preparation: {{ $json.target_exam === 'JEE' ? 'Solve at least 10 previous year problems daily — consistency beats cramming every time!' : 'Focus on speed and accuracy — practice CET mock tests timed to the minute!' }}


You're doing great — keep going! 💪

Best wishes,
GrowthDesk Student Support Team

nodes.name: Notify Lead Scoring (Lead Scoring Team)
nodes.notes: Replace with HTTP Request node to POST to Lead Scoring Team's lead scoring webhook.

nodes.name: Cron - Check Unresponded Every 3hrs
nodes.notes: Every 3 hours checks for human requests that have not been responded to.

nodes.name: Fetch Unresponded Human Requests
nodes.notes: Replace with Postgres node to query real DB.

parameters.subject: =⏰ Unresponded Human Requests | 3-Hour Check | GrowthDesk
parameters.message:
=

Unresponded Human Support Requests

The following human support requests have not been responded to in over 3 hours:

Check Time: {{ $json.check_time }}


DB Query to find unresponded tickets:
{{ $json.db_query }}


Action Required:

  • Senior Support: Contact all unresponded students immediately
  • Priority: Sort by Lead Score (highest first)
  • Operations Lead: Update PMO tracker with response status
  • Target: Zero unresponded human requests at end of day

Note: Unresponded human requests are the #1 reason for lost enrollments in our dataset.
